TokenElevationShadows.Setting.BaseOpacit: The starting opacity (0 to 1) of the shadow when the token begins to elevate.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.MaxElevati: The elevation at which the shadow completely fades away.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.Azimuth.Hi: Compass direction of the sun (0 = North, 90 = East, 180 = South, 270 = West). Shadows cast away from the sun.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.Altitude.H: Height of the sun in the sky (1 = Horizon, 89 = High Noon). Lower altitudes create longer shadows.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.MeshOffset: How aggressively the token visually moves up the screen per unit of elevation.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.AlphaThres: Opacity threshold (0 to 1) for stripping baked-in shadows. Higher values strip more pixels.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.RequireSta: If enabled, tokens will only visually elevate and cast dynamic shadows if they have an airborne status effect applied. Otherwise, they remain visually grounded.
A comma-separated list of system-specific status IDs that trigger visual elevation (e.g., 'fly, hover, levitate'). Defaults to 'fly'.
TokenElevationShadows.Setting.TimeIntegr: Synchronise shadow directions with in-game time tracking modules.
